description: A vertical graphic built on a photograph taken from behind of an officer in a black POLICE ICE tactical vest escorting a man in a dark hooded sweatshirt whose hands are cuffed behind his back, beside a dark blue car in a wet parking lot. A red band across the bottom carries white text reading Commit Crimes? Expect ICE.
notable_text: POLICE ICE; Commit Crimes? Expect ICE
